Microsoft Products

Xbox Series X

Microsoft Xbox Series X 1TB Gaming Console

R 17 000

Condition: Brand New

4.0 ★★★★☆ (2)

Product Description

Xbox Series X, the fastest, most powerful Xbox ever. Explore rich new worlds with 12 teraflops of raw graphic processing power, DirectX ray tracing, a custom SSD, and 4K gaming. Make the most of every gaming minute with Quick Resume, lightning-fast load times, and gameplay of up to 120 FPS—all powered by Xbox Velocity Architecture. Enjoy thousands of games from four generations of Xbox, with hundreds of optimized titles that look and play better than ever. And when you add Xbox Game Pass Ultimate (membership sold separately), you get online multiplayer to play with friends and an instant library of 100+ high-quality games, including day one releases from Xbox Game Studios.*

Specifications

Product Dimensions: 32.3 x 23 x 2.18 cm; 4.09 kg
Batteries: 6 Lithium Ion batteries required (included)
GamePlay Limit: 120 FPS
Colour: Black

Product Dimensions:15.1 x 15.1 x 30.1 cm; 1.29 kgs

Microsoft Surface Laptop Studio 2

Microsoft Surface Laptop Studio 2 | 14.4" Touchscreen Laptop | Platinum | Windows 11 Home | 2023 Model | i7 / RAM 16GB / SSD 512GB

R 20 000

Condition: Brand New

4.0 ★★★★☆ (2)

Product Description

Surface Laptop Studio 2 is a versatile laptop for creativity and entertainment, combining cutting-edge design with incredible performance to power the most demanding apps. It can power your creativity and entertainment all day. Surface Laptop Studio 2 is designed to power the best of Microsoft’s innovation. Connect and engage better than ever before with the new wide-field of view camera with image enhancements powered by AI. Windows 11 is optimised for touch on Surface Laptop Studio 2. Tap, drag, swipe, and pinch like you do on your smartphone.
